command:
uv run python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import urllib.error

# Attempt Poleg-Polsky 2026 PDF first (Nature gives a direct pdf link).
pdf_url = 'https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-026-70288-4.pdf'
out = 'tasks/t0010_hunt_missed_dsgc_models/assets/paper/10.1038_s41467-026-70288-4/files/polegpolsky_2026_ml-motion-primitives.pdf'
req = urllib.request.Request(pdf_url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (neuron-channels-arf; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'})
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp:
        data = resp.read()
    with open(out, 'wb') as f:
        f.write(data)
    print('poleg-polsky pdf bytes:', len(data))
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print('poleg-polsky HTTP error:', e.code, e.reason)
except Exception as e:
    print('poleg-polsky ERROR:', repr(e))
